description: MVP-karakas besplatnogo scenariya dlya dvoih igrokov v dating-formate.
product_goal: Pomoch pare bystro pochat znakomstvo, pochuvstvovat vibe drug druga i poluchit temy dlya prodolzheniya obshcheniya.

stage_purposes.warm_up: Snyat startovoe napryazhenie i bystro vvesti v igru bez tyazheloy refleksii.
stage_purposes.taste: Pokazat bazovye predpochteniya, atmosferu i pervyy vibe cheloveka.
stage_purposes.rhythm: Proyavit temp, stil dvizheniya po situacii i komfortnyy format vechera.
stage_purposes.comfort: Pereyti k oshchushcheniyu uyuta, vnimaniya i prijatnogo kontakta bez uyazvimosti.
stage_purposes.attraction: Myagko podsvetit, chto tseplyaet i delaet kontakt lichno interesnym.
stage_purposes.continuation: Postroit estestvennyy most v dalneyshee obshchenie vne igry.

scene_flow.title: Start of Route
scene_flow.purpose: Dat korotkiy kontekst i zapustit marshrut bez dolgogo onboarding.
question_templates: Kakoy vibe dlya takogo vechera tebe blizhe?
S chem tebe legche nachat takoe priklyuchenie?

scene_flow.title: Pick the Vibe
scene_flow.purpose: Bystro proyavit vkus, sredu i atmosferu, v kotoroy cheloveku priyatno nachinat marshrut.
question_templates: Kakoe nachalo dlya takogo marshruta tebe blizhe vsego?
Kakaya atmosfera zdes bystro delaet vse bolee tvoim?
Kuda tebya tyanet v takoy istorii chisto po oshchushcheniyu?

scene_flow.title: Find the Pace
scene_flow.purpose: Perevesti sovpavshiy vibe v ponyatnyy ritm, temp i stil dvizheniya po vecheru.
question_templates: V takom meste tebe priyatnee srazu dvigatsya dalshe ili chut osmotretsya?
Tebe blizhe, kogda vecher skladyvaetsya sam ili kogda u nego uzhe est legkiy plan?
Esli poyavlyaetsya neozhidannyy povorot, ty skoree podhvatish ego ili ostaneshsya v tekushchem ritme?

scene_flow.title: Third Option
scene_flow.purpose: Myagko oboyti razlichie cherez tretij variant i vse ravno proyavit komfortnyy ritm dlya oboih.
question_templates: Vy vybrali raznye napravleniya. Kakoy format etogo tretiego varianta tebe legche prinyat?
Chto sdelalo by etu ostanovku komfortnoy po tempu imenno dlya tebya?
Tut tebe blizhe ostorozhno voiti v moment ili srazu poehat dal'she?

scene_flow.title: Comfort Signal
scene_flow.purpose: Pereyti k stupeni Comfort: proyavit, kak chelovek chuvstvuet uyut, vnimanie i prijatnyy kontakt.
question_templates: V kakoy moment ty obychno ponimaesh: mne zdes po-nastoyashchemu komfortno?
Chto v takom epizode delaet kontakt bolee teplym dlya tebya?
Kakoy nebolshoy znak vnimaniya zdes schityvalsya by osobenno prijatno?

scene_flow.title: Closer Signal
scene_flow.purpose: Perevesti Comfort v myagkuyu zonu simpatij i podsvetit, chto imenno tseplyaet v kontakte.
question_templates: Chto v cheloveke mozhet sdelat takoy marshrut lichno interesnym dlya tebya?
Kakoy moment zdes ostavil by samoe prijatnoe poslevkusie?
Chto moglo by neozhidanno zacepit tebya uzhe na etom etape?

scene_flow.title: Route End
scene_flow.purpose: Zavershit marshrut, sborkoy nabljudeniy i sohranit most v realnoe obshchenie.
question_templates: Chto iz etogo marshruta ty by zabralsya v realnuyu vstrechu?
Kakuyu sleduyushchuyu temu ty by s radostyu prodolzhil uzhe v chate ili pri vstreche?
